   Bytes Format Units    Label   Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1-  5 A5     ---      System  Abbreviated Milky Way Satellite Name (1)
   7- 16 F10.6  deg      RAdeg   Right Ascension, decimal degrees (J2000)
  18- 27 F10.6  deg      DEdeg   Declination, decimal degrees (J2000)
  29- 34 F6.1   mag      rmag0   ?=-999.0 Extinction-corrected r-band AB magnitude
  36- 42 F7.2   mag      (g-r)0  ?=-999.00 Extinction-corrected g-r color
  44- 44 I1     ---      nmask   Number of DEIMOS masks contributing to measurement(s)
  46- 50 I5     s        texp    Total exposure time
  52- 56 F5.1   ---      SN      Combined signal-to-noise
  58- 64 F7.2   km.s-1   HRV     ?=-999.00 Heliocentric radial velocity
  66- 70 F5.2   km.s-1 e_HRV     ?=-999.00 Uncertainty in HRV
  72- 78 F7.2   10-10m   EWCaT   ?=-999.00 Equivalent width, Ca triplet
  80- 86 F7.2   10-10m e_EWCaT   ?=-999.00 Uncertainty in EWCaT
  88- 94 F7.2   [-]      FeH     ?=-999.00 CaT-based [Fe/H] (2, 3)
  96-102 F7.2   [-]    e_FeH     ?=-999.00 Uncertainty in FeH
 104-107 I4     ---      Var     ?=-999 Variable HRV flag, Section 5.2 (4)
 109-113 F5.3   ---      Pmem    Membership probability, Section 8
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Note (1): One row per unique star with measured DEIMOS properties.
Note (2): Calibration based on Navabi et al. (2026) [2026MNRAS.546ag019N].
Note (3): CaT-based [Fe/H] and error are populated only for member stars 
    with MVmag < 3. 
Note (4): Flag set to unity if source is a velocity variable as defined 
    in Section 5.2; this flag is set to -999 if there are no repeat 
    measurements.
